open_houses.description: Wonderful grand Pacific Heights home that has everything.
Grand 3 story Queen Anne Style Victorian, just steps to Alamo Square! Two story single family plus legal attic apartment. 3 car garage. Over 3200 Square Feet.
Twilight Open House - Thursday 4/30 from 5-7pm
Open House - Saturday and Sunday 5/2 & 5/3 from 2-4pm
Open House - Saturday and Sunday 5/2 & 5/3 from 2-4pm

Originally built in 1876 per water records, the home features large gracious rooms, high ceilings and improvements that are appropriate for the era including: box beam ceilings, use of gold leaf and unique stone and tile work. 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, 2 car parking.

Originally built in 1876 per water records, the home features large gracious rooms, high ceilings and improvements that are appropriate for the era including: box beam ceilings, use of gold leaf and unique stone and tile work. 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, 2 car parking.
Twilight Champagne Open. Come enjoy stunning views while sipping champagne in this completely renovated 3 BR / 2 BA home.
Stunning 3BR / 2 BA Fully renovated view home + 1BR/1BA. Both units open.
Stunning 3BR / 2 BA Fully renovated view home + 1BR/1BA. Both units open.

3660 20th is a five-unit multifamily investment in the heart of San Francisco's Mission District, steps from Dolores Park and the Valencia Corridor. 3,862 SF building on a 2,866 SF lot. Offered at $1,350,000 ($270,000/unit, $350/SF) with significant mark-to-market upside. OM and disclosures are available upon request.
